object_a.label: picture frame
object_a.description: small rectangular wall sign with text (Virginia Beach)
object_a.long_form_open_description: Small framed sign hung on the beige wall, centered vertically in the upper half of the wall section. Light-colored board with darker text; weather/beach-themed decorative sign. Visible words include 'VIRGINIA BEACH' in uppercase near the bottom of the sign.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: mounted on the wall between the glass door (left) and the stairs (right)
